chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Customer
triplets.predicate: has only one primary per type

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: customer, items, payment status, delivery information

triplets.subject: SHIPMENT
triplets.object: Physical delivery of products to customers

entities_post_resolution.name: Active/Inactive Status
entities_post_resolution.definition: A binary attribute indicating whether an entity (e.g., customer or product) is currently active and eligible to perform actions (such as placing orders or being for sale).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation
- Active/inactive status | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique SKU code
- Human-readable product name
- Unit price in base currency (EUR)
- Active/inactive status
- Belongs to exactly one Category | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether customer can place orders | NO | IS_ACTIVE | BOOLEAN | Whether currently for sale | NO

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: Represents a single line item in a sales order, linking a specific product to a specific order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | **Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item on a Sales Order that records a specific product, the quantity ordered, and the unit price at the time of purchase.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder | ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER LINE ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at time of purchase. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID column is a self-referential foreign key in the TB_CATEGORY table that stores the parent category's ID, enabling hierarchical relationships among categories.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID | INT | Parent category for hierarchy | YES | PARENT_CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) [self-reference]

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: A Payment is a monetary transaction that settles a Sales Order, recording the amount, payment method, timestamp, status, and linkage to exactly one Sales Order.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Key Attributes:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Payment          → PAYMENT | **Description**: Monetary transactions settling order amounts. | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A sales order is the formal record of a customer's request to purchase products, created at the point of checkout or order placement, containing the order ID, customer reference, order date, items, total value, delivery information, payment status, and a lifecycle status (e.g., PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Context**: Orders are created when customers complete checkout. They track the customer, items, payment status, and delivery information. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Order ID
- References exactly one Customer
- Order date when transaction was initiated
- Total monetary value
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Key Attributes:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments | Key Attributes:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Dest

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: The SALES_ORDER_HDR entity represents the header record for each customer sales order, identified by ORDER_ID as the primary key and linked to the customer by CUST_ID (and referenced by order line items and payments).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: The shipment represents the physical delivery of products from a warehouse to a customer's delivery address, identified by a unique shipment ID, optionally linked to a sales order, and carrying tracking details and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Key Attributes:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | Definition: The physical delivery of Products from a Warehouse to a Customer's delivery address. | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Description**: Physical delivery of products to customers. | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category(Category Id)
entities_post_resolution.definition: The unique identifier (primary key) for a product in the TB_PRODUCT table.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
PARENT_CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) [self-reference] | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | Product          → TB_PRODUCT

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master.Cust Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: Master record for all registered platform customers, identified by the primary key CUST_ID in the CUSTOMER_MASTER table.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | **Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER | Foreign Keys
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment) | CUST_ID | INT | Unique customer identifier | NO | CUST_ID | INT | Customer who placed order | NO

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: A physical address associated with a customer that is used as the delivery destination for shipments.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | **Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Order ID
- References exactly one Customer
- Order date when transaction was initiated
- Total monetary value
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, SHIPPED, DELIVERED, CANCELLED
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exact

entities_post_resolution.name: Decimal(10,2)
entities_post_resolution.definition: Total order value expressed as a monetary amount with two decimal places (decimal(12,2)).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: UNIT_PRICE | DECIMAL(10,2) | Price in EUR | NO | TOTAL_AMT | DECIMAL(12,2) | Total order value | NO

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Login Email Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer's unique email address that serves as the login credential/identifier for accessing the system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation
- Active/inactive status

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Delivery And
entities_post_resolution.definition: The set of delivery and billing addresses associated with a customer account, allowing multiple addresses with one primary per type for order fulfillment and billing.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID
- Valid email address (required for login)
- One or more delivery/billing addresses
- Geographic region for tax calculation
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase

entities_post_resolution.name: Quantity
entities_post_resolution.definition: Represents the number of units in a transaction or line item, typically an integer quantity used to calculate extended amounts.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | | QUANTITY | INT | Number of units | NO |

entities_post_resolution.name: Region Code
entities_post_resolution.definition: REGION_CODE is the geographic region code used for tax purposes to identify the tax jurisdiction of a transaction.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO

entities_post_resolution.name: Refund
entities_post_resolution.definition: A monetary reimbursement provided to customers when an order is cancelled or items are returned, typically resulting in a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled. | ## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund. | Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

entities_post_resolution.name: Varchar
entities_post_resolution.definition: A variable-length character string data type used for text fields in relational databases, where the column stores values such as region codes, emails, names, categories, product names, and SKUs within specified length limits.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: REGION_CODE | VARCHAR(10) | Geographic region for tax | YES | EMAIL | VARCHAR(150) | Unique email address for login | NO | STATUS_CODE | VARCHAR(20) | PENDING/CONFIRMED/SHIPPED/DELIVERED/CANCELLED | NO | FULL_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Customer's full name | NO | CATEGORY_NAME | VARCHAR(200) | Category display name | NO | PRODUCT_NAME | VARCHAR(300) | Product display name | NO | SKU | VARCHAR(50) | Stock Keeping Unit code | NO

entities_post_resolution.name: 30 Days Of Purchase
entities_post_resolution.definition: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order
entities_post_resolution.definition:

- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | Key Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order | SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR

entities_post_resolution.name: At Least One Order
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:

entities_post_resolution.name: Valid Category
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Must belong to a valid category before being sold
- Prices can change daily based on market conditions
- Inactive products cannot be ordered but remain for historical reference

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core information about customers including identifiers, contact details, regional assignment, account creation timestamp, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores information about products, including identifiers, naming, category association, pricing, and active status.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores hierarchical categories for products, including each category's name and a reference to its parent category.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores core information about customer orders, including identifiers, order date, total amount, status, payment confirmation timestamp, delivery timestamp, and record creation timestamp.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores individual line items for orders, including the associated order and product, quantity, unit price, and line amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed for customer orders, including the payment method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments corresponding to customer orders, including where and when items were shipped, their tracking information, and current shipment status.
